description_long: This is a rectangular, portable radio receiver with a retro design, featuring a prominent telescopic metal antenna extending from the top. The front panel displays a frequency tuning scale, several horizontal speaker grilles, and a large red volume knob on the right side. There are additional buttons and switches for tuning and band selection, as well as a carrying handle attached to the left side. The casing appears to be made of plastic with metallic accents, and the overall color scheme is a mix of black, brown, and gray. The radio is compact and lightweight, suitable for carrying or placing on a flat surface in urban environments.
description: A compact, retro-style portable radio receiver with a telescopic antenna, front tuning scale, speaker grilles, and a large red volume knob. The casing is primarily black and brown with metallic details and a side handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tuning scale, speaker grilles, large red volume knob, and control buttons.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile, protruding antenna, and the red volume knob.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back surface, the antenna, and the attached carrying handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handle and the antenna, with minimal visible controls.
